# Downzilla

Website: https://downzilla.buzz

Name: Downzilla

Description:
Downzilla is an online video downloader that enables users to extract and download publicly accessible video and audio from supported websites through a web browser.

Primary Features:
- Video downloads
- Audio downloads
- Multiple download formats
- Multiple quality options
- video streaming
- Playlist support (where available)
- Mobile-friendly interface

Documentation:
https://downzilla.buzz/docs

FAQ:
https://downzilla.buzz/faq

Features:
https://downzilla.buzz/features

Supported Sites:
https://downzilla.buzz/supported-sites

Terms of Service:
https://www.downzilla.buzz/user/user/info/TandC

Robots:
https://downzilla.buzz/robots.txt

Sitemap:
https://downzilla.buzz/sitemap.xml

Notes:
- Download options depend on the source website.
- Supported websites may change over time.
- Users are responsible for complying with applicable copyright laws and the terms of service of the source websites.
